Cancel.li2: Future Charges: By confirming, you will immediately stop all future automatic billing.
Cancel.desc2: To proceed with the cancellation, please enter the email address associated with your account.
Cancel.cancelSuccessDesc: Your subscription has been successfully cancelled. You will retain access until the end of your current billing period.

Privacy.title: Data Processing and Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Text: This instrument establishes the policies and procedures applied by SummaryVox (hereinafter, "the Company", "We" or "the Platform") regarding the collection, safeguarding, processing, and confidentiality of personal data provided by users during their interaction with our services. By using the Platform, the user provides informed and explicit consent for the processing of their information under the terms described herein.
Privacy.s2Text: We strictly limit ourselves to collecting the information necessary for the provision and optimization of our service. Such data includes, but is not limited to:
Privacy.s2Li1: Identity and Contact Data: Name, email address, and access credentials linked to the user's profile.
Privacy.s2Li2: Financial and Transactional Data: Information relating to the gateway and payment methods corresponding to subscription management. Note that SummaryVox does not store sensitive credit card data on its own servers, delegating this task to third-party payment processors certified under the highest security standards (PCI-DSS).
Privacy.s2Li3: Usage and Interaction Data: Navigation metrics, history of consumed summaries (audio/PDF), and configuration preferences.
Privacy.s3Text: The information collected by the Company has as its legal basis the correct and effective provision of the agreed commercial services. Specifically, the data will be used to:
Privacy.s3Li1: Manage user accounts and enable concurrent access to the summaries platform.
Privacy.s3Li2: Manage billing procedures, process recurring charges, and validate trial periods (e.g. 24-hour free trial).
Privacy.s3Li3: Communicate substantial changes in Platform operations, including advance notifications regarding fee modifications and automatic subscription renewals.
Privacy.s3Li4: Provide technical assistance and process requests entered through official Support channels.
Privacy.s4Title: 4. Disclosure of Data to Third Parties
Privacy.s4Text: The Company contractually binds itself not to commercialize, assign, or in any way alienate access to the obtained personal database to third parties. Information disclosure is strictly limited to the necessary operational exchange of data with trusted service providers (e.g. payment gateways and web hosting), provided they are subject to confidentiality agreements and comply with international standard data protection laws.
Privacy.s5Title: 5. Systemic Policies on Breach and Security
Privacy.s5Text: SummaryVox applies organizational, procedural, and technical measures aimed at safeguarding the integrity of stored data against unauthorized access, alteration, or loss. The transmission of critical information is encrypted using Secure Socket Layer (SSL) protocol or equivalent/superior technologies.
Privacy.s6Text: We will retain user data only for the period the subscription or account remains active, and keep information for audit and legal compliance purposes as required. The user retains full legal right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, and Object (ARCO rights) to the processing of their information at any time by contacting the addresses provided by the Company.

SubPolicy.title: Subscription and Billing Policy
SubPolicy.intro: This document is legally annexed to the SummaryVox General Terms and Conditions, aiming to specify and make transparent the commercial modality and billing commitments signed with the user upon joining our paid plans.
SubPolicy.s1Title: 1. Granting of the Grace Period (Free Trial)
SubPolicy.s1Text: Upon formalized inclusion in the Premium Plan, the user has the right to enjoy a grace period for 24 uninterrupted hours counting from initial registration. During this window, access to the platform is entirely free, with the Company committing not to make any charge, hold, or debit on the pre-authorized payment method.
SubPolicy.s2Text: If expectations are not met, the user has the incontestable right to cancel this commercial relationship during the primary 24 hours. Any revocation processed during this trial period shall operate for free, without punitive penalty, exit cost, or future debt applied by the Company.
SubPolicy.s3Text: If the 24-hour grace period elapses without explicit cancellation by the user, the Company shall consider conformity granted. Automatically, this legal fact will initiate the Premium Subscription via the pre-agreed deduction of the monthly fee. These stipends are recurring, bringing automatic tacit renewal every subsequent calendar month.
SubPolicy.s4Title: 4. Effects of Unilateral Resolution of the Subscription
SubPolicy.s4Text: The user retains the power to unilaterally terminate the subscription contract after the trial period. Performing the cancellation via the Platform's dashboard constitutes a legal block on SummaryVox and its payment gateways to execute collection in billing cycles following the drop. Despite such commercial resolution, the Company must allow the user continued access to previously acquired Premium functions until the culmination of the invoiced cycle.
SubPolicy.s5Text: The fee set by the Premium Subscription may be subject to unilateral revisions and modifications by SummaryVox. To protect fairness, we impose a pre-contractual duty to serve reliable notice to the user about proposed variations regarding amounts to be charged, granting at least thirty (30) calendar days advance notice before modifying the debit, allowing the user to cancel if they reject the new pricing.

Terms.title: General Terms and Conditions
Terms.s1Text: By accessing, browsing, or using the SummaryVox platform (hereinafter, "the Service" or "the Platform"), the user agrees to be bound by these General Terms and Conditions of Use, as well as any applicable legal regulations. Use attributes user status and implies full acceptance without reservations. If the user does not agree, they should refrain from using the Platform.
Terms.s2Text: SummaryVox provides access to a digital library of literary summaries in audio and PDF format. Such content is exclusively curated by our editorial team. We reserve the right to modify, update, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Service at any time without notice.
Terms.s3Text: Platform access works under two main subscription modalities:
Terms.s3Li1: Free Subscription (Basic): Grants restricted access to the catalog, limiting playback, download, and extended platform functions.
Terms.s3Li2: Premium Subscription: Grants unrestricted access to the complete summaries catalog in audio and PDF, enabling advanced playback features and offline download.
Terms.s4Title: 4. Hiring Policy, Grace Period, and Cancellation
Terms.s4Text: Upon subscribing to the Premium Plan, the user is subject to the following guidelines:
Terms.s4Li1: Charge-Exempt Trial Period: A 24-hour grace period is granted from registration. No deduction will be made during this span.
Terms.s4Li2: Revocation Right: The user is entitled to cancel unilaterally and without penalty within the first 24 hours.
Terms.s4Li3: Automatic Renewal: After 24 hours without cancellation, the subscription perfects and cycles monthly automatically.
Terms.s4Li4: Cancellation Effects: Cancellation stops future billing, but the user retains Premium access until the end of the paid cycle. No pro-rated refunds.
Terms.s4Li5: Economic Conditions: Base Premium rate starts at $29.99 USD/month. SummaryVox reserves the right to notify fee changes 30 days in advance.
Terms.s5Text: All summaries, audio, designs, and content are the exclusive intellectual property of SummaryVox and protected under copyright laws. Reproduction, resale, distribution, or public exploitation without authorization is strictly prohibited.
Terms.s6Text: Summaries are published for educational and informational purposes. SummaryVox shall not be civilly or commercially responsible for any direct or indirect damage derived from the use or inability to use the Service.
Terms.s7Text: For exercising rights or dispute resolution, contact support@summaryvox.com or view our FAQ section.
